description: Manufacturing Round 2 Run 1: MRP + APS DSL models (7 new models + dicts/permissions/menus)

userStories.title: Add pe_alternative_material model with full config
userStories.description:
Add a new model pe_alternative_material to track BOM line alternative/substitute materials for PCBA manufacturing.

Modify these files (append to existing JSON arrays):

1. plugins/pcba-erp/config/models.json — append:
{
  "code": "pe_alternative_material",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "替代料",
  "displayName:en": "Alternative Material",
  "description": "BOM line alternative/substitute materials for PCBA manufacturing",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "ArrowLeftRight",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_am_material_id"
  }
}

2. plugins/pcba-erp/config/fields.json — append 6 fields:
- pe_am_bom_line_id: REFERENCE to pe_bom_line (targetField: pe_bom_line_bom_id), required
- pe_am_material_id: REFERENCE to pe_product (targetField: pe_product_name), required. This is the substitute material.
- pe_am_priority: INTEGER, constraints min:1 max:99, required. Lower number = higher priority.
- pe_am_conversion_factor: DECIMAL, defaultValue "1.0". Conversion ratio vs primary material.
- pe_am_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_enable_status, defaultValue ENABLED
- pe_am_remark: STRING, constraints maxLength 500

3. plugins/pcba-erp/config/commands.json — append 3 commands:
- pe:create_alt_material (CREATE, modelCode pe_alternative_material, inputFields all 6, autoSetFields pe_am_status FIXED_VALUE ENABLED, permissions ["PE.product.manage"])
- pe:update_alt_material (UPDATE, modelCode pe_alternative_material, inputFields all 6, permissions ["PE.product.manage"])
- pe:delete_alt_material (DELETE, modelCode pe_alternative_material, permissions ["PE.product.manage"], confirmMessage)

4. plugins/pcba-erp/config/bindings.json — append 6 bindings:
All for modelCode pe_alternative_material, sequence 1-6, visible/editable true (except pe_am_bom_line_id visible false for parent FK)

5. plugins/pcba-erp/config/pages.json — append list + form pages:
- pe_alternative_material_list: LIST page with data-table, columns for material, priority, conversion_factor, status, actions (edit/delete)
- pe_alternative_material_form: FORM page

Follow EXACT JSON patterns from existing models (pe_brand, pe_bom_line). Verify JSON validity after changes.
acceptanceCriteria: fields.json contains 6 new pe_am_* fields with correct dataTypes
pages.json contains pe_alternative_material_list and pe_alternative_material_form pages
All JSON files pass validation: python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('plugins/pcba-erp/config/models.json'))"
pe_am_bom_line_id has refTarget pointing to pe_bom_line
pe_am_material_id has refTarget pointing to pe_product
userStories.notes: This is a config-only story (DSL JSON). No TDD needed. The parent FK pe_am_bom_line_id should have visible:false in bindings since it's set by context. Follow pe_bom_line field pattern for REFERENCE fields. The pe_bom_line model already exists in the plugin.

userStories.title: Add pe_mrp_run model with full config
userStories.description:
Add a new model pe_mrp_run to track MRP execution runs and their parameters/results.

Append to config files:

1. models.json — append:
{
  "code": "pe_mrp_run",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "MRP运算",
  "displayName:en": "MRP Run",
  "description": "MRP planning run execution records with parameters and results",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Calculator",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_mrp_code",
    "subtitleField": "pe_mrp_status"
  }
}

2. fields.json — append 10 fields:
- pe_mrp_code: STRING, required, constraints maxLength 50. Auto-generated code.
- pe_mrp_run_date: DATE, required
- pe_mrp_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_mrp_status, defaultValue DRAFT
- pe_mrp_scope: ENUM, dictCode pe_mrp_scope, defaultValue ALL
- pe_mrp_horizon_days: INTEGER, defaultValue "90", constraints min:1 max:365
- pe_mrp_planned_count: INTEGER, defaultValue "0", extension readOnly true
- pe_mrp_exception_count: INTEGER, defaultValue "0", extension readOnly true
- pe_mrp_duration_ms: INTEGER, extension readOnly true
- pe_mrp_params: STRING, constraints maxLength 2000. JSON parameters for the run.
- pe_mrp_remark: STRING, constraints maxLength 500

3. commands.json — append 4 commands:
- pe:create_mrp_run (CREATE, inputFields [pe_mrp_run_date, pe_mrp_scope, pe_mrp_horizon_days, pe_mrp_params, pe_mrp_remark], autoSetFields: pe_mrp_code AUTO_GENERATE pattern "MRP-{yyyyMMdd}-{seq}", pe_mrp_status FIXED_VALUE DRAFT)
- pe:update_mrp_run (UPDATE, inputFields [pe_mrp_run_date, pe_mrp_scope, pe_mrp_horizon_days, pe_mrp_params, pe_mrp_remark])
- pe:delete_mrp_run (DELETE with confirmMessage)
- pe:execute_mrp (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_mrp_status, fromStates ["DRAFT"], toState "RUNNING", handler "pe:execute_mrp", extension confirmMessage "确认执行MRP运算？" / "Run MRP calculation?")
All permissions: ["PE.mrp.manage"]

4. bindings.json — 10 bindings for pe_mrp_run. Read-only fields (planned_count, exception_count, duration_ms) should have editable:false.

5. pages.json — pe_mrp_run_list (LIST with table columns: code, run_date, status, scope, horizon_days, planned_count, exception_count, duration_ms; actions: edit, delete, execute button with visibleWhen status=DRAFT) + pe_mrp_run_form (FORM)

The execute button should use: { "code": "execute", "action": "command", "icon": "Play", "commandCode": "pe:execute_mrp", "permissionCode": "PE.mrp.manage", "visibleWhen": { "fieldCode": "pe_mrp_status", "operator": "equals", "value": "DRAFT" } }
acceptanceCriteria: pe_mrp_code has AUTO_GENERATE strategy in create command
pe:execute_mrp is STATE_TRANSITION from DRAFT to RUNNING with handler
pe_mrp_run_list page has execute button visible when status=DRAFT
Read-only fields have editable:false in bindings
userStories.notes: Config-only story. The pe:execute_mrp handler will be implemented in Run 3 (Java). For now just define the command with handler field. The pe_mrp_status and pe_mrp_scope dicts will be added in US-008.

userStories.title: Add pe_planned_order model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_planned_order model — MRP output representing planned purchase or production orders.

Append to config files:

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_planned_order",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "计划订单",
  "displayName:en": "Planned Order",
  "description": "MRP-generated planned purchase or production orders",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "ClipboardList",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_plo_material_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_plo_order_type"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 14 fields:
- pe_plo_mrp_run_id: REFERENCE→pe_mrp_run (targetField pe_mrp_code), required
- pe_plo_material_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_plo_material_name: STRING, maxLength 200. Denormalized product name.
- pe_plo_order_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_planned_order_type, required
- pe_plo_order_qty: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0
- pe_plo_order_date: DATE, required. Planned release date.
- pe_plo_need_date: DATE, required. When material is needed.
- pe_plo_lead_time_days: INTEGER, min:0
- pe_plo_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_planned_order_status, defaultValue PLANNED
- pe_plo_converted_type: STRING, maxLength 100. Target model code after conversion.
- pe_plo_converted_id: STRING, maxLength 50. Record ID of converted order.
- pe_plo_source_demand: STRING, maxLength 2000. JSON description of demand source.
- pe_plo_lot_sizing_policy: STRING, maxLength 50
- pe_plo_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

3. commands.json — 4 commands:
- pe:create_planned_order (CREATE, permissions PE.mrp.manage) — Note: normally created by MRP engine, not manually
- pe:confirm_planned_order (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_plo_status, fromStates ["PLANNED"], toState "CONFIRMED", permissions PE.mrp.manage)
- pe:convert_planned_order (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_plo_status, fromStates ["CONFIRMED"], toState "CONVERTED", handler "pe:convert_planned_order", permissions PE.mrp.manage, confirmMessage)
- pe:cancel_planned_order (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_plo_status, fromStates ["PLANNED","CONFIRMED"], toState "CANCELLED", permissions PE.mrp.manage)

4. bindings.json — 14 bindings. converted_type, converted_id, source_demand should be editable:false (system-set).

5. pages.json — pe_planned_order_list with columns: material_name, order_type (TAG), order_qty, order_date, need_date, lead_time_days, status (TAG), lot_sizing_policy. Actions: confirm (visible when PLANNED), convert (visible when CONFIRMED), cancel. + pe_planned_order_form
acceptanceCriteria: pe:cancel_planned_order transitions from PLANNED or CONFIRMED to CANCELLED
pe_planned_order_list has confirm/convert/cancel action buttons with correct visibleWhen
System-set fields have editable:false in bindings
userStories.notes: Config-only. The pe:convert_planned_order handler will be implemented in Run 5 (Chain). Dicts pe_planned_order_type and pe_planned_order_status added in US-008.

userStories.title: Add pe_mrp_exception model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_mrp_exception model — MRP exception/warning messages for planners.

Append to config files:

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_mrp_exception",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "MRP异常",
  "displayName:en": "MRP Exception",
  "description": "MRP exception messages: past due, shortage, long lead time warnings",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "AlertTriangle",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_mex_material_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_mex_type"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 8 fields:
- pe_mex_mrp_run_id: REFERENCE→pe_mrp_run (targetField pe_mrp_code), required
- pe_mex_material_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_mex_material_name: STRING, maxLength 200. Denormalized.
- pe_mex_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_mrp_exception_type, required
- pe_mex_severity: ENUM, dictCode pe_severity, required
- pe_mex_description: STRING, maxLength 1000
- pe_mex_suggested_action: STRING, maxLength 1000
- pe_mex_resolved: BOOLEAN, defaultValue "false"

3. commands.json — 2 commands:
- pe:create_mrp_exception (CREATE, for MRP engine to create exceptions programmatically, permissions PE.mrp.manage)
- pe:resolve_mrp_exception (UPDATE, modelCode pe_mrp_exception, inputFields ["pe_mex_resolved"], autoSetFields pe_mex_resolved FIXED_VALUE true, permissions PE.mrp.manage)

4. bindings.json — 8 bindings. All editable:false except pe_mex_resolved (this is a read-only model, updated by MRP engine or resolve action).

5. pages.json — pe_mrp_exception_list (LIST only, no form needed for read-only model). Columns: material_name, type (TAG), severity (TAG with color), description, suggested_action, resolved (TAG). Actions: resolve button (visible when resolved=false). searchFields: pe_mex_material_name, pe_mex_type, pe_mex_severity, pe_mex_resolved
acceptanceCriteria: pe_mrp_exception_list page has resolve action visible when not resolved
userStories.notes: Config-only. Read-only model populated by MRP engine. Only user action is 'resolve'. Dicts pe_mrp_exception_type and pe_severity added in US-008.

userStories.title: Add pe_resource model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_resource model — production resources (machines, lines, workers, tools) for APS scheduling.

Append to config files:

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_resource",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "生产资源",
  "displayName:en": "Production Resource",
  "description": "Production resources: machines, lines, workers for APS scheduling",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Cog",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_res_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_res_type"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 10 fields:
- pe_res_code: STRING, required, maxLength 50, feature searchable+sortable
- pe_res_name: STRING, required, maxLength 200, feature searchable+sortable
- pe_res_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_resource_type, required, feature searchable
- pe_res_subtype: STRING, maxLength 50. E.g. "SMT", "REFLOW", "AOI"
- pe_res_capacity_per_hour: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_res_line_id: STRING, maxLength 50. Production line identifier.
- pe_res_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_resource_status, defaultValue AVAILABLE, feature searchable
- pe_res_location: STRING, maxLength 200
- pe_res_manufacturer: STRING, maxLength 200
- pe_res_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

3. commands.json — 5 commands:
- pe:create_resource (CREATE, inputFields all 10, autoSetFields pe_res_status FIXED_VALUE AVAILABLE, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:update_resource (UPDATE, all fields, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:delete_resource (DELETE with confirmMessage, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:set_resource_maintenance (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_res_status, fromStates ["AVAILABLE","BREAKDOWN"], toState "MAINTENANCE", permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:set_resource_available (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_res_status, fromStates ["MAINTENANCE","OFFLINE"], toState "AVAILABLE", permissions PE.resource.manage)

4. bindings.json — 10 bindings for pe_resource.

5. pages.json — pe_resource_list (columns: code, name, type TAG, subtype, capacity_per_hour, line_id, status TAG, location. Actions: edit, delete, maintenance button visible when AVAILABLE, available button visible when MAINTENANCE/OFFLINE) + pe_resource_form
acceptanceCriteria: pe_resource_list page has maintenance and available action buttons with correct visibleWhen
userStories.notes: Config-only. Dicts pe_resource_type and pe_resource_status added in US-008. The visibleWhen for maintenance button needs operator 'in' with values ['available','breakdown'] — check if the platform supports 'in' operator, otherwise use 'equals' with single value AVAILABLE.

userStories.title: Add pe_resource_calendar model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_resource_calendar model — resource availability schedule by date and shift for APS.

Append to config files:

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_resource_calendar",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "资源日历",
  "displayName:en": "Resource Calendar",
  "description": "Resource availability by date and shift for APS scheduling",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Calendar",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_rc_resource_id"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 8 fields:
- pe_rc_resource_id: REFERENCE→pe_resource (targetField pe_res_name), required
- pe_rc_date: DATE, required, feature sortable
- pe_rc_shift: ENUM, dictCode pe_shift, required, defaultValue DAY
- pe_rc_start_time: STRING, maxLength 5. Format "HH:mm" e.g. "08:00"
- pe_rc_end_time: STRING, maxLength 5. Format "HH:mm" e.g. "17:00"
- pe_rc_available_hours: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0 max:24
- pe_rc_is_holiday: BOOLEAN, defaultValue "false"
- pe_rc_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

3. commands.json — 4 commands:
- pe:create_resource_calendar (CREATE, inputFields all 8, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:update_resource_calendar (UPDATE, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:delete_resource_calendar (DELETE, permissions PE.resource.manage)
- pe:generate_calendar (CUSTOM, modelCode pe_resource_calendar, handler "pe:generate_calendar", permissions PE.resource.manage, extension confirmMessage "批量生成日历？" / "Generate calendar entries?")

4. bindings.json — 8 bindings.

5. pages.json — pe_resource_calendar_list (columns: resource_id, date, shift TAG, start_time, end_time, available_hours, is_holiday TAG. searchFields: pe_rc_resource_id, pe_rc_date, pe_rc_shift. Actions: edit, delete. Toolbar: create + generate_calendar button) + pe_resource_calendar_form
acceptanceCriteria: pe:generate_calendar is CUSTOM type with handler
pe_resource_calendar_list has generate button in toolbar
userStories.notes: Config-only. pe:generate_calendar handler will be implemented later. Dict pe_shift added in US-008.

userStories.title: Add pe_schedule_result model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_schedule_result model — APS scheduling output with assigned resource and time slots.

Append to config files:

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_schedule_result",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "排程结果",
  "displayName:en": "Schedule Result",
  "description": "APS scheduling output: assigned resource, time slots, strategy info",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "GanttChart",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_sched_operation_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_sched_resource_name"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 12 fields:
- pe_sched_work_order_id: REFERENCE→pe_production_plan (targetField pe_pp_code), required
- pe_sched_operation_name: STRING, maxLength 200, required
- pe_sched_resource_id: REFERENCE→pe_resource (targetField pe_res_name), required
- pe_sched_resource_name: STRING, maxLength 200. Denormalized.
- pe_sched_start_time: DATETIME, required
- pe_sched_end_time: DATETIME, required
- pe_sched_setup_time_min: INTEGER, min:0. Changeover time.
- pe_sched_processing_time_min: INTEGER, min:0
- pe_sched_strategy: STRING, maxLength 50. E.g. "BOTTLENECK_DBR"
- pe_sched_version: INTEGER, defaultValue "1". For what-if comparison.
- pe_sched_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_schedule_status, defaultValue DRAFT
- pe_sched_run_date: DATE

3. commands.json — 3 commands:
- pe:create_schedule_result (CREATE, permissions PE.aps.manage) — created by APS engine
- pe:publish_schedule (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_sched_status, fromStates ["DRAFT"], toState "PUBLISHED", permissions PE.aps.manage, confirmMessage)
- pe:delete_schedule_result (DELETE, permissions PE.aps.manage)

4. bindings.json — 12 bindings. Most editable:false (system-generated by APS).

5. pages.json — pe_schedule_result_list (columns: work_order_id, operation_name, resource_name, start_time, end_time, setup_time_min, processing_time_min, strategy, version, status TAG. searchFields: pe_sched_work_order_id, pe_sched_resource_id, pe_sched_status, pe_sched_strategy. Actions: publish visible when DRAFT, delete) + pe_schedule_result_form (read-only detail view)
acceptanceCriteria: pe_schedule_result_list has publish action visible when DRAFT
userStories.notes: Config-only. The pe_production_plan model already exists. Dict pe_schedule_status added in US-008. GanttChart icon may not exist in Lucide — use 'BarChart3' or 'Gantt' as fallback.

userStories.title: Add MRP + APS dicts, permissions, and menus
userStories.description:
Add all new dictionaries, permissions, and menu entries for the MRP and APS modules.

1. plugins/pcba-erp/config/dicts.json — append these dicts:

a) pe_mrp_status:
  DRAFT (草稿/Draft, #d9d9d9), RUNNING (运算中/Running, #1890ff), COMPLETED (已完成/Completed, #52c41a), FAILED (失败/Failed, #ff4d4f)

b) pe_mrp_scope:
  ALL (全部物料/All Materials, #1890ff), SELECTED_MATERIALS (指定物料/Selected Materials, #722ed1), SELECTED_ORDERS (指定订单/Selected Orders, #fa8c16)

c) pe_planned_order_type:
  PURCHASE (采购/Purchase, #1890ff), PRODUCTION (生产/Production, #52c41a)

d) pe_planned_order_status:
  PLANNED (已计划/Planned, #d9d9d9), CONFIRMED (已确认/Confirmed, #1890ff), CONVERTED (已转换/Converted, #52c41a), CANCELLED (已取消/Cancelled, #ff4d4f)

e) pe_mrp_exception_type:
  PAST_DUE (逾期/Past Due, #ff4d4f), SHORTAGE (缺料/Shortage, #fa541c), LONG_LEAD_TIME (长交期/Long Lead Time, #fa8c16), KIT_INCOMPLETE (齐套不全/Kit Incomplete, #722ed1), EXCESS (超量/Excess, #13c2c2)

f) pe_severity:
  WARNING (警告/Warning, #fa8c16), CRITICAL (严重/Critical, #ff4d4f)

g) pe_resource_type:
  MACHINE (机台/Machine, #1890ff), LINE (产线/Line, #52c41a), WORKER (人员/Worker, #722ed1), TOOL (工具/Tool, #fa8c16)

h) pe_resource_status:
  AVAILABLE (可用/Available, #52c41a), MAINTENANCE (维护中/Maintenance, #fa8c16), OFFLINE (离线/Offline, #d9d9d9), BREAKDOWN (故障/Breakdown, #ff4d4f)

i) pe_shift:
  DAY (白班/Day Shift, #1890ff), NIGHT (夜班/Night Shift, #722ed1), OVERTIME (加班/Overtime, #fa8c16)

j) pe_schedule_status:
  DRAFT (草稿/Draft, #d9d9d9), PUBLISHED (已发布/Published, #52c41a), OUTDATED (已过期/Outdated, #ff4d4f)

2. plugins/pcba-erp/config/menus.json — append menu groups:

a) MRP group header:
  code: pe_mrp_group, name "MRP计划" / "MRP Planning", path /pcba-erp/mrp, icon Calculator, type 1, parentCode pe_root, orderNo 50

b) MRP children:
  - pe_mrp_runs: "MRP运算" / "MRP Runs", path /pcba-erp/mrp/runs, type 2, parentCode pe_mrp_group, orderNo 1, pageKey pe_mrp_run_list, permissionCode PE.mrp.read
  - pe_planned_orders: "计划订单" / "Planned Orders", path /pcba-erp/mrp/planned-orders, type 2, parentCode pe_mrp_group, orderNo 2, pageKey pe_planned_order_list, permissionCode PE.mrp.read
  - pe_mrp_exceptions: "MRP异常" / "MRP Exceptions", path /pcba-erp/mrp/exceptions, type 2, parentCode pe_mrp_group, orderNo 3, pageKey pe_mrp_exception_list, permissionCode PE.mrp.read
  - pe_alt_materials: "替代料" / "Alternative Materials", path /pcba-erp/mrp/alternatives, type 2, parentCode pe_mrp_group, orderNo 4, pageKey pe_alternative_material_list, permissionCode PE.product.read

c) APS group header:
  code: pe_aps_group, name "APS排程" / "APS Scheduling", path /pcba-erp/aps, icon Timer, type 1, parentCode pe_root, orderNo 60

d) APS children:
  - pe_resources: "生产资源" / "Resources", path /pcba-erp/aps/resources, type 2, parentCode pe_aps_group, orderNo 1, pageKey pe_resource_list, permissionCode PE.resource.read
  - pe_resource_calendars: "资源日历" / "Resource Calendar", path /pcba-erp/aps/calendar, type 2, parentCode pe_aps_group, orderNo 2, pageKey pe_resource_calendar_list, permissionCode PE.resource.read
  - pe_schedule_results: "排程结果" / "Schedule Results", path /pcba-erp/aps/results, type 2, parentCode pe_aps_group, orderNo 3, pageKey pe_schedule_result_list, permissionCode PE.aps.read

3. Verify ALL JSON files are valid after changes.

Note: Check existing menus.json for the exact structure and type values. In the existing plugin, type=1 is used for group headers and type=2 for leaf menus with pageKey.
acceptanceCriteria: dicts.json contains all 10 new dictionaries with correct items and colors
menus.json contains pe_mrp_group and pe_aps_group menu groups
menus.json contains 7 leaf menu items under the two groups
Each menu has correct parentCode, pageKey, and permissionCode
All dict items have zh-CN and en labels with sortNo
All JSON files pass validation: python3 validates all config files
userStories.notes: Config-only. Check existing menus.json for orderNo numbering — the new groups should come after existing production group but before any other groups. The permissions PE.mrp.manage/read, PE.aps.manage/read, PE.resource.manage/read should be referenced in commands and menus but the actual permission definitions may need to be added to a permissions.json file if one exists. Check if plugins/pcba-erp/config/permissions.json exists and add entries there too.
